sheets.title: InfinityVault — Advertising & Marketing Investment Audit
sheets.header_note: Scored against current constraints: tight cash, thin margins, ~$1K/mo Uncapped repayment starting June, May inventory order priority.

rows: Rebuild Enhanced Brand Content with comparison module, lifestyle imagery, FAQ. Free with Brand Registry.
Rewrite titles, bullets, description for the 216 Diamond Grain, 288 single, 288 2-pack. Saturate backend keywords (Pokemon, sports cards, MTG, etc.).
Restructure PPC per the campaign plan
Implement the agreed plan: shift Vintage 216 to near-zero bids, push Diamond Grain, hit 14%/12% ACoS targets on 288 + 2-pack. Already scoped.
Auto-shows in competitor listings. Post 2–3x/week. Pure brand exposure on Amazon's owned surface.
Vertical scroll story above A+ content. Storefront with cross-sell between SL200, 216s, 288s.
Reshoot hero + lifestyle on white background with cards inside binder. Phone camera + softbox works.
Free Amazon program — earn ~10% back on sales from external traffic you drive. Pre-req for influencer/TikTok plays.
Amazon Vine for 288 single (long-term storage risk)
Pay to enroll, get 5–30 verified reviews from Vine voices. Critical for the 288 single 1-packs at LTSF risk.
60–90 sec listing video. Pour cards in, zip it, flip through. Use on all 3 listings + Sponsored Brands video.
Sponsored Brands Video + Sponsored Display retargeting
New ad types layered onto existing $450 budget. SB Video typically 30–50% lower ACoS than SP for branded queries.
Send free binders to 10–20 small/mid TCG creators in exchange for honest review/mention. No paid post fee.
Subscribe & Save + coupon stack on 288 single
Drive sell-through on LTSF-risk inventory. 5% S&S + 5% clippable coupon.
TikTok Shop launch (TCG niche is hot there)
List the 3 SKUs on TikTok Shop. Free to join. Pair with organic short-form content (unboxings, before/after pulls).
Pinterest drives long-tail traffic for hobby/collectible niches. 20 pins/week tied to Storefront URL.
Insert card in package with QR to sign up for binder care tips + early access. Builds an asset you own.
Genuine presence (not spam) in r/PokemonTCG, r/mtgfinance, r/sportscards. Answer questions, mention products when on-topic.
Retarget shoppers across the web who viewed competing binders. Only run once core PPC is at target ACoS.
Lightning Deal / 7-Day Deal on a 216 SKU
Margin sacrifice for ranking boost. Only run after Diamond Grain ad structure proves out.
Direct sales channel. Long payoff — only worth it once Amazon house is in order and brand has email list.

tables.name: Tier legend:
columns: Do first — free/near-free, immediate ROI, no cash strain. Most of these are leverage moves you can't NOT do.
rows: Queue for after May inventory order + once Uncapped plan is signed. Small cash, real lift.
Defer until base is profitable. Higher effort, slower payoff, or requires upstream foundation (email, brand registry assets, etc.).

tables.name: Notes on benefit estimates:
tables.note: • Benefits are revenue lift estimates, not profit. Apply your ~10% post-ad margin target to estimate profit impact.
rows: • Ranges reflect uncertainty — pick the low end if conservative, midpoint for planning.
• Benefits are NOT additive across all rows — they overlap (e.g., A+ content + photography both lift conversion on the same listing).
• 12-month figures assume the work is maintained, not one-and-done.
• Estimates are calibrated to your business size from prior conversations — adjust if revenue is materially different than assumed.

sheets.title: Recommended 90-Day Rollout
sheets.header_note: Sequenced for cash flow (May inventory first, June Uncapped payments begin) — front-loads free/high-ROI moves.

rows:
1) Restructure PPC per plan (Vintage 216 down, Diamond Grain up)
2) Rewrite all 3 listings (titles, bullets, backend SEO)
3) Enroll Brand Referral Bonus
4) DIY photo reshoot
Free wins. Stops the ad bleed identified as the #1 margin killer. No cash impact during May inventory squeeze.

1) A+ Content overhaul on all 3 listings
2) Brand Story + Storefront tidy
3) Enroll Amazon Vine for 288 single ASINs (×2)
4) Start Amazon Posts cadence
Coincides with first Uncapped payment in June, but Vine fees are small and Vine reviews are essential to clear 288 LTSF risk.

1) Commission product video ($300–700)
2) Add Sponsored Brands Video + SD retargeting
3) Begin influencer seeding (10–15 creators)
4) Subscribe & Save + coupon on 288 single
Cash should be freer once Phase 1 ad savings + Phase 2 listing lifts compound. Video unlocks SBV ad type.

1) Evaluate TikTok Shop launch
2) Start email list build via package inserts
3) Test Sponsored Display off-Amazon
4) Pinterest cadence
Only after the Amazon house is genuinely in order. Don't open new channels while the primary one is leaking.

tables.name: Cumulative impact estimate (low–high range, revenue lift)
rows: Mostly PPC restructure savings + listing copy lift
A+ Content compounding + Vine reviews landing
Video + influencer seeding contributing; cleared LTSF risk
Full stack working; assumes consistent maintenance

tables.name: Caveats:
tables.note: • Estimates assume disciplined execution + maintenance. Skipping any one Tier 1 item materially lowers the range.
rows: • Numbers reflect REVENUE lift, not profit. Apply your post-ad margin target (~10%) to get profit impact.
• Doesn't account for inventory replenishment cash needs — coordinate with cash flow plan.
• Diamond Grain 216 (high stock) is the leverage SKU — most of the lift will flow through it.
• If Vintage 216 stays out of AWD, the price-anchor strategy weakens and Tier 1 estimates compress.
